description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low perimeter wall. The house features a mix of white and natural wood exterior finishes, with large windows and sliding glass doors that open onto small garden areas. The front yard is landscaped with several mature trees and shrubs, providing privacy and greenery. The main entryway is centrally located, marked by a simple door and a short walkway leading from the street. The backyard includes a private green space, partially enclosed by the house and fencing. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white and wood finishes, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, landscaped yard, and prominent trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat roofline, perimeter wall, and a mix of open and enclosed garden spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional greenery, and the back facade with large windows and a patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, secondary entry points, and the continuation of the flat roof and wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a simple door, short walkway, and landscaped approach, no porch or overhang.
